strengths: Hands-on Python ETL and Pandas experience
Proven data pipeline and validation implementations
Experience with BI tools (Power BI, Tableau)
weaknesses: No explicit LLM or GitHub Copilot usage

Fewer explicit client-facing/data testing engineer titles
improvement_bullets: Optimized relational database queries and data reconciliation processes to ensure data quality and integrity, utilizing automated scripts to validate large-scale ETL pipelines.
Integrated GitHub Copilot and LLM-assisted coding workflows into the software development lifecycle to accelerate script generation and improve testing efficiency.
Operated within an Agile/Scrum environment, utilizing JIRA and Confluence to manage sprint backlogs, track defects, and facilitate cross-functional collaboration with stakeholders.
Developed and deployed automated testing scripts within CI/CD pipelines to ensure seamless deployment and ongoing data pipeline reliability.
Leveraged AWS S3 and cloud-based data platforms to build, test, and validate scalable data workflows, ensuring high availability and accurate data ingestion.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Testing Engineer opportunity with InfiCare Staffing. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep technical background in ETL testing and SQL, and my passion for ensuring data reliability within complex, large-scale architectures. What interests me about working for InfiCare Staffing is its commitment to innovative data solutions, which inspires me as I am constantly looking to apply cutting-edge automation techniques to solve real-world data challenges. I believe my expertise in data validation techniques and my proficiency in Python-based automation would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my time at Shine Masters, I approached problems by identifying inefficiencies in reporting, which led me to automate key workflows. In fact, when tasked with streamlining client onboarding, I integrated automated data intake pipelines using Zapier and Python, which saved 8 hours per week and significantly reduced manual data entry errors. This allowed our team to focus on high-impact lead generation, proving how my technical interventions directly drive operational success. Ultimately, I know that the Data Testing Engineer role at InfiCare Staffing would allow me to bring my data validation expertise to your mission-critical data pipelines. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies (MassMutual) enabled me to develop my robust reconciliation skills. I collaborated with underwriting and product teams to clean and reconcile complex insurance testing data, which improved overall data accuracy by 30%. This project showcased my ability to act as a bridge between technical data requirements and business stakeholder needs, ensuring that all data structures were reliable and well-documented. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python and SQL in working on robust data pipeline validation at InfiCare Staffing. I know that my experience in automated testing and my ability to work within Agile/Scrum methodologies align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Testing Engineer role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
